data.raceComments: {"comment":"3. DEFIANCE finished fifth of eight when first-up from a spell last start over 1100m at Hawkesbury after racing on the speed for most of the trip. Fitter and dropping back in distance will be well supported to take this race out. 1. BRUCE I AM is on debut and is trained by Joseph Pride who will have him ready to fire following a recent third of nine over 816m in a Warwick Farm trial. Jumps from an inside draw so should race on the speed and be fighting out the finish. 8. DENISE'S GAL resumes from a spell after having finished sixth of eight over 1100m at Gosford three-and-a-half months ago. She won a recent nine-runner trial over 816m at Warwick Farm and jumping from the inside gate should receive a soft trip in the running. She should have strengthened up during her break and is well worth a second look. 9. FINAL GIFT was in contention on the bend and finished third last time over 900m at Muswellbrook when resuming from a spell.  Tackling a deeper field this time but he is up to the task.","runners":[3,1,8,9],"exclusive":true}

extraMarkets.name: WYONG-R3-Fav Out
extraMarkets.message: Must finish 1st or 2nd behind N/A Runner
